problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
mechanism: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis
hypothesis: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis may resolve How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 15 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
